creator: dan@freebsddiary.org
text:
New security port - log file scanner

Logcheck is part of the Abacus Project of security tools. It is a program created to help in the processing of UNIX
system logfiles generated by the various Abacus Project tools, system daemons, Wietse Venema's TCP Wrapper and
Log Daemon packages, and the Firewall Toolkit© by Trusted Information Systems Inc.(TIS). Logcheck also works
very well at reporting on other common operating system security violations and strange events.

How-To-Repeat: logcheck homepage is http://www.psionic.com/abacus/logcheck/
